archive_data.question_text: Select the combination of letters that when sequentially placed in the blanks of the given series, will logically complete the series. _XRLQ_PJOT_HMRL_ KPJ_

explanation.english: The pattern follows specific letter position sequences where blanks are filled with T, U, M, E, and C. Analyzing the series: T(20)X(24)R(18)L(12)Q(17), U(21)P(16)J(10)O(15)T(20), M(13)H(8)M(13)R(18)L(12), E(5)K(11)P(16)J(10), C(3). The first letters of each group follow the pattern 20, 21, 13, 5, 3 showing the logical sequence completion.
explanation.tanglish: Ithil eluthukalin idathu padangal thodar parpattil amaikkappattullathu. T, U, M, E, C endra eluthugalai blank-il serththal sariyana thodarai varum. Analippu: T(20)X(24)R(18)L(12)Q(17), U(21)P(16)J(10)O(15)T(20), M(13)H(8)M(13)R(18)L(12), E(5)K(11)P(16)J(10), C(3).

archive_data.question_text: What should come in place of '?' in the given series based on the English alphabetical order? DUT GSR JQP MON ?

explanation.english: The first letters increase by 3 (D=4, G=7, J=10, M=13, P=16). The second letters decrease by 2 (U=21, S=19, Q=17, O=15, M=13). The third letters decrease by 1 (T=20, R=18, P=16, N=14, L=12). Therefore, the missing term is PML.
explanation.tanglish: Mudhal eluthugal 3 anu valarndhu varugirathu (D-4, G-7, J-10, M-13, P-16). Irandaam eluthugal 2 anu kuraindhu varugirathu (U-21, S-19, Q-17, O-15, M-13). Moonraam eluthugal 1 anu kuraindhu varugirathu (T-20, R-18, P-16, N-14, L-12). Aanal aduthu PML varum.

archive_data.question_text: Six people, B, C, D, E, F and S, are sitting in a row facing north(but not necessarily in the same order). Only two people sit to the left of S. Only two people sit between S and F. Only one person sits between F and C. D sits to the immediate left of E. How many people sit to the right of B?

explanation.english: Since two people sit to the left of S, S is at position 3. With two people between S and F, F is at position 6 (right end). One person between F and C places C at position 4. D sits immediately left of E, so they occupy positions 1 and 2 together. This leaves B at position 5. Only F (position 6) sits to the right of B. Therefore, the answer is One.
explanation.tanglish: S ku idathil irundu 2 per vanthaal, S 3-aam idathil amarndhirukkum. S um F um idaiyil 2 per irukkum endral, F 6-aam idathil (vala thunaiyil) varum. F ku idaiyil 1 per irukkum endral, C 4-aam idathil varum. D, E ku edamel idathil amarndhirukkum, avargal 1-2 idangalil amarvaar gal. Idhin migitha 5-aam idam B ku uriyathu. B ku valathil F matrame ullathu. Pathil One.

archive_data.question_text: Identify the figure given in the options which when put in place of the question mark (?) will logically complete the series.

explanation.english: This is a figure-based series completion question. The correct option follows the established visual pattern in the series.
explanation.tanglish: Ithu chithira thodar kivar pathil. Sariyana chithiram thodaril ulla vizhuvarathaip purithi paarkkum.

archive_data.question_text: RN 20 is related to SI 4 in a certain way. In the same way, MK 5 is related to NF -11. To which of the following is QV 3 related, following the same logic?

explanation.english: The coding logic involves: First letter shifted by +1 (R→S, M→N, Q→R), Second letter shifted by -5 (N→I, K→F, V→Q). The number decreases by 16 (20-16=4, 5-16=-11, 3-16=-13). Applying this to QV 3 gives RQ -13.
explanation.tanglish: Koodu murai: Mudhal eluthu +1 anu maarum (R→S, M→N, Q→R), Irandaam eluthu -5 anu maarum (N→I, K→F, V→Q). Enn 16 anu kuraindhu varum (20-16=4, 5-16=-11, 3-16=-13). QV 3 ku ithai payanpaduthinal RQ -13 varum.

archive_data.question_text: What should come in place of the question mark (?) in the given series? 4 30 82 160 264 ?

explanation.english: Calculate differences between consecutive terms: 30-4=26, 82-30=52, 160-82=78, 264-160=104. The differences follow the pattern 26×1, 26×2, 26×3, 26×4. The next difference is 26×5=130. Therefore, 264+130=394.
explanation.tanglish: Ondru serndhu ondrukku idaiyana vithyasangal 26, 52, 78, 104. Ithu 26×1, 26×2, 26×3, 26×4 endra murai. Adutha vithyasam 26×5=130. Aanal 264+130=394.
